description_long: This is a modern, luxury coupe car with a sleek, angular design and a prominent front grille, reminiscent of high-end brands. The body is finished in a glossy white paint, complemented by black accents on the wheels, window trim, and rear section. The car features four doors, large tinted windows, and a streamlined roofline that gives it a sophisticated, urban appeal. The front end is characterized by sharp, horizontal headlights and a bold, rectangular grille, while the rear is cleanly styled with minimalistic taillights and a subtle license plate area. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys, adding to the car's sporty yet elegant stance. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have premium seating and a modern dashboard layout.
description: A sleek, white luxury coupe car with four doors, black accents, and a streamlined, modern design. Features a bold front grille, large alloy wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, sharp headlights, and a glimpse of the premium interior.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door configuration, large alloy wheels, and streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying minimalistic taillights, a clean trunk area, and the license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door arrangement, window layout, and black wheel accents.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
